title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. dillenii
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. dillenii, also known as Dillen's kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the kidney vetch plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Dillen's kidney vetch include the treatment of kidney and urinary tract issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent and to soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Dillen's kidney vetch can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
